label: Ingest Repository
description: Fetch repo files and store them as knowledge nodes in Graphonomous

label: Analyze Codebase
description: Run LLM analysis on ingested repo code — architecture, dependencies, fleet-relevant patterns

label: Query Knowledge
description: Search the knowledge graph for fleet-relevant patterns, route data, dispatch logic

label: Graph Health
description: Check Graphonomous stats — node counts, confidence, orphans

label: Benchmark Fleet Agent
description: Run PRISM evaluation cycles — tests recall, transfer, and stability on fleet + repo knowledge
